title: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK — Stage 5 candidate
rationale: Named ★★+ level (prior day RTH H/L, 5-day H/L) broken or reclaimed on a 5m bar with vol >= vol_mult × 20-bar avg and body >= body_min_cents past the level. Bypasses v14's 10:00 ET gate + ribbon >=30c spread filter. Entry: ITM-2 or ATM 0DTE based on strike_offset. Profit-lock after favor_premium >= entry × (1+threshold) raises stop to entry × (1+offset) so a winning trade never goes negative.

account_size.note: qty=10 capital ~ $670-$2,800 per trade depending on premium. $1K paper requires qty=3 -> 30% of headline P&L. $10K supports full qty=10. $25K+ no cap binds.

op20_disclosures.sample_bias: Selected from 1728 Stage 1 + Stage 2 grinder combos via 4 gates (Stage 1 floors, Stage 2 refine, Stage 3 regime-robustness, Stage 4 sub-window stability). Survivorship bias possible — walk-forward + real-fills required before live.
op20_disclosures.oos_evidence: WALK-FORWARD PASS on BS sim 2026-05-13 (TRAIN $25,676 / TEST $12,537 / per-month ratio 1.35x), but BS sim itself INVALIDATED by real-fills test below. Walk-forward verdict UNRELIABLE until pipeline re-runs on real OPRA fills, not BS.
op20_disclosures.real_fills_evidence: CAVEAT (effective FAIL) 2026-05-13 09:09 ET with FULL OPRA 16mo cache. 4 of 4 measured days FLIP from BS-winners to real-fills LOSSES. 2025-04-07 BS +$288 -> real -$926 (-422%). 2026-04-29 J anchor BS +$182 -> real -$329 (-281%). 2026-05-04 J anchor BS +$192 -> real -$234 (-222%). 2026-05-05 J anchor BS +$202 -> real -$236 (-217%). 2 of top-3 abs days STILL miss OPRA (2025-04-08 strike 521, 2026-03-26 strike 652) -- those strikes are 5 away from atm, at edge of cached ±5 window. PATTERN: SNIPER enters then immediately gets stopped at -10% premium. BS sim systematically OVER-estimates entry premium. See analysis/recommendations/sniper-v1-realfills.json + docs/REAL-FILLS-SNIPER-2026-05-13.md

failure_modes.blow_up_scenario: If profit_lock fails on a gap day, stop is -10% premium = ~$200 max loss/trade

op20_disclosures.regime_note: Strategy was discovered after 2026-05-11 (bull-flag break) and 2026-05-12 (level-break flush) J trades. Backtest spans 2025-01 to 2026-05; live regime unknown.

next_actions: 1. STATUS: SNIPER is NOT ratifiable. Real-fills verdict CAVEAT confirmed even with full OPRA cache (7,358 contracts ingested 2026-05-13 09:08 ET).

2. ROOT CAUSE: BS sim fundamentally over-estimates entry premium. SNIPER 'wins' on BS but immediately stops at -10% on real fills. 4 of 4 measured days show |diff| > 200%. 0 of 4 within OP 20's ±20% tolerance.

3. T41 (HIGH, tonight): Retire BS sim entirely per J. Replace simulator.py with simulator_real.py wrapper. All evaluators move to real-fills. Estimated 20-30x slowdown per combo; may need batched OPRA pre-fetch.

4. T42 (HIGH, tonight): Re-run entire SNIPER pipeline (Stages 1-5) with simulator_real instead of BS sim. New winner combo expected to differ significantly — current winner's profit_lock OFF + tp1=0.40 may need re-tuning when real fills are honest.

5. WATCHER STATUS: sniper_watcher remains WATCH-ONLY per OP 21. Today's observations logged to watcher-observations.jsonl + graded EOD via watcher_replay. NOT promoting to live paper trades until pipeline re-runs on real fills.

6. STILL BLOCKED OPRA: 2 of top-3 absolute BS-P&L days (2025-04-08 strike 521C, 2026-03-26 strike 652C) — strikes at edge of ±5 cached window. T43 (LOW): re-ingest with ±10 strike window OR add per-day adaptive expansion.
7. J ratification (rule 9): no live trading until SNIPER pipeline re-runs on real fills + survives full OP 20 disclosures.
